description_long: This is a modern double bed with an upholstered frame in a muted beige color, featuring a gently curved headboard and two integrated nightstands on either side. The headboard is padded and has a subtle stitched pattern, providing both comfort and style. The bed is dressed with a white sheet and a matching comforter accented by light green stripes, along with four pillows, two of which have decorative green patterns. The nightstands are boxy and seamlessly attached to the bed frame, creating a cohesive and functional design. The mattress is thick and plush, sitting atop a solid platform base that extends to the floor. The overall look is contemporary and minimal, suitable for urban apartments or modern homes.
description: A modern beige upholstered double bed with a curved headboard, integrated nightstands, and white bedding with green accents.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full width of the curved headboard and the attached nightstands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bed's thickness, mattress, and the left nightstand.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the headboard's design, bedding arrangement, and both nightstands.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bed's profile, mattress, and the right nightstand.
